title: Include Which Recipients Mass Email Tracking Failed to Send

posts.author: estoppi (Ethan Stoppi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently the Mass Email Tracking page does not list the recipients who we selected and the only way to find out is going through one by one to see which recipients are missing by process of elimination.

What are you trying to achieve

We would like a list of recipients it failed to send the mass email.

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @estoppi ,

If you go to Mass Email Tracking and then click on the specific email that was sent, it’ll open a panel on the left. That panel will give you tons of information, including how many it failed to send, and it will list the email addresses it failed to send to once clicked to open.

Screenshot 2025-09-07 at 8.36.55612×212 10.5 KB

posts.author: estoppi (Ethan Stoppi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi David,

Thank you for responding. However, under my “Failed to Send” tab it lists “0” and says “All emails were successfully sent” since some of the clients did not have an email address in their field, their names simply don’t appear. We were hoping that could be remedied.
